text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, time for a different angle...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You again? If you think I'm gonna<n>play with you
like last time—think<n>again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Fine. C'mere. I'll pet you, but<n>just a little.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I wish everyone in the worldwas as chill as you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then they wouldn't say stupid things<n>about me or
look down on me, and I<n>could just live the way I...

Narita Taishin has loads of fun taking<n>pictures
while playing with a cat. But<n>she completely
forgets about<n>training...
